content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.44%, Bank Nifty -0.79%, VIX +2.5% to 17.04 — broad market weak but pockets of strength in IT, Pharma, and stock-specific Q4 winners (Polycab +9%, SRF +10%, Pidilite +8.5%, Coforge +15.6%, Thermax +12%). My existing book is heavily exposed to these very Q4 winners and is sitting at +1.5% unrealized — discipline is to trail SLs aggressively to lock in gains, not chase fresh extended breakouts. Deployed at 67%, well above prior dormancy concerns.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.5% unrealized winner. Current SL 1064.67 is above CMP 1077.70 by less than 2% — flush with normal noise. Trail SL down to 1055 (2.1% below CMP, locks ~7.2% gain) to give the breakout room while preserving the recovery option. Stock at Rs 1083 with 52w high Rs 1141.90, brokerage TPs Rs 1100-1260. Note: this is a slight loosening, but original SL was self-stopout-prone. Wait — Rule says SL can only be tightened. Cancel this MODIFY logic — keeping SL at 1064.67 is the rule-compliant choice."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: SL 1064.67 cannot be loosened per rules. CMP 1077.70 sits ~1.2% above SL — within the 1% trail-gap floor's spirit but stored. Holding as-is; if SL trips at 1064.67 that's still +8.2% locked. Target 1135 intact (brokerage range supports)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -0.4%. SL 121 (-3.3% from CMP), target 135. VIX rising +2.5%, geopolitical optionality intact. No adjustment needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY would be wasted — emitting HOLD instead. SL 4725.56 is 1.3% below CMP 4790, which respects the 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 results May 14 = binary catalyst within 4 sessions (just outside the 3-session danger window). Will reassess next session as event approaches. Override: emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replaces above MODIFY. +4.7% winner. SL 4725.56 is 1.35% below CMP 4790 — respects 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 sessions away) = monitor; if still held by next session, will trim or tighten per Rule 11. Holding as-is now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% with strong sector tailwind (SRF +10%). SL 6960 sits 1.2% below CMP 7043, respecting trail-gap floor. Target 7250 vs lifetime high 7200 already printed. Q4 results already declared (PAT +124%) — no binary overhang. Letting it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% with SL 365 only 0.14% below CMP 365.50 — flush with CMP. Per Rule 17 do NOT pre-empt SL with panic exit. Q4 PAT +31% YoY, lending portfolio +32%. Thesis intact; let SL do its job at -1% from entry if it trips."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% and at fresh ATH. SL 822 is only 0.07% below entry — but raising it now would put it within 1.1% of CMP 830.60 (just outside trail-gap floor). Holding stored SL; will tighten on next confirmation candle above 835."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — replacing with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replaces above. +7.0% winner. SL 1329.47 sits 1.3% below CMP 1346.90 — respects trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT surge +144%, FY26 revenue +35.9%, strong execution. Target 1395 reachable; SL already locks +5.6% gain if hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.5% winner. SL 2998 (2.4% below CMP 3070) provides room for normal volatility. FY26 revenue +38%, defense theme strong. No event in next 3 sessions. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.4% winner. SL 827.41 sits 1.7% below CMP 841.75 — respects trail-gap floor. Q4 record-high revenue, FY27 guidance issued. Target 875 = 52w high; if reached, will reassess. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37% beat, +8.6% intraday but my entry is at 1490 vs CMP 1481 (-0.6%). SL 1445 (-2.4% from CMP) gives normal range absorption. Strong fundamental catalyst — let thesis play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just printed today (May 7) — PBT +115%, US sales +46%, USFDA Glycerol Phenylbutyrate approval. -1.9% currently but this is an entry-day chop, not thesis breakdown. SL 2400 (-1.4% from CMP 2433) gives small room. The data is materially bullish post-results; respecting SL not panic-exiting."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 1580 (-2.2% from CMP 1614.80). Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Note: promoter pledge 18% + heavy debt are governance flags I should have weighed harder at entry. Holding to original SL — no new info post-entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (+0.1%). SL 2700 (-3.0% from CMP 2782) gives ample room. Specialty chem sector breakout day. Target 2920 reasonable. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (+0.1%). +9.2% breakout day with strong Q4 (revenue +27%, FMEG +47%). SL 8800 (-3.4% from CMP 9103). Target 9550 vs raised brokerage TP 9800. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1064.67, 1.2% below CMP. Cannot loosen per rules. Trail will trigger if reached, locking +8.2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, SL 121 adequate."
    },
    {

      "reasoning": "May 14 board meeting in 4 sessions — monitor; will trim or tighten next session as we enter the 3-session window."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 respects 1% trail-gap floor; Q4 already done."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL flush with CMP but Rule 17 forbids pre-SL panic exit. Let it trip if it must."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL preserved; will tighten on next confirmation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Trail at 1329.47 locks +5.6%, respects trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense rally intact; SL gives breathing room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 827 respects trail-gap; near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst playing out; SL gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print today materially bullish; entry-day chop is not thesis breakdown."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL adequate at -2.2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong sector tailwind, SL has room."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 breakout; SL 8800 adequate."

  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG BUY at 2015 still OPEN from prior session — reviewed: stock has run ahead and not pulled back. Letting limit sit; if untouched by EOD will cancel. HFCL MIS BUY at 133.50 OPEN for 3273 minutes (multi-session) — this should not be lingering as MIS; will explicitly cancel next tick if still showing. New BULLISH candidates rejected with rationale: THERMAX (+12% extended, capital-goods cluster already covered via POLYCAB), GABRIEL (auto-component cluster, not adding), RAMCOCEM/KPIL (cement/infra not high-conviction over current book), TATATECH (volume signal unclear direction), TITAGARH (flat-on-volume = direction unknown), LAURUSLABS/NH (pharma cluster already covered via LUPIN/WOCKPHARMA), SOBHA (5-day cooldown after prior exit). Book is 67% deployed across 14 names with material winners; quality of management beats quantity of admits today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at +1.5% unrealized with 14 holdings. Multiple positions are Q4-results winners (Polycab, SRF, Pidilite, Coforge, Lupin, Marico, Wockpharma, Navinfluor, GRSE, CAMS) — the entire book is essentially riding the Q4 earnings cycle, which is concentration risk if results theme rolls over. Several SLs are flush-to-tight against CMP (PNBHOUSING, MARICO, ABCAPITAL, LUPIN) — Rule 17 governs: respect them, do not panic-exit. HAL approaching May 14 binary event — flagged for next-session tighten/trim. Cancel-pending review needed on stale BHARATFORG and especially HFCL MIS (multi-session MIS is a violation pattern). No new admits this cycle — book is well-deployed and winners need to be managed, not diluted."
}
